seoTitle: Mount Luke vs Mount Macarthur — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mount Luke and Mount Macarthur. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Mount Luke vs Mount Macarthur: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mount Luke and Mount Macarthur.
heading: Mount Luke vs Mount Macarthur — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mount Luke, Queensland and Mount Macarthur, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mount Macarthur has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Mount Luke (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mount Luke or Mount Macarthur safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mount Luke has a flood risk score of 49/100, while Mount Macarthur scores 28/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mount Luke scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Mount Macarthur scores 40/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mount Luke or Mount Macarthur?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mount Macarthur has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.03% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
